form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 390m at this track behind Kraken Rum beaten 9 lengths (22.83). More than capable and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 390m at this track behind Kraken Rum beaten 9 lengths (22.83). More than capable and has to be included.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last over 390m at this track beaten 12 lengths (23.01) behind Kraken Rum in a Grade 5 on April 6. Has run blistering time here with a 22 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (22.85) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing a 5 length second. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (22.85) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing a 5 length second. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 3 lengths over 425m at Bendigo in a handy (24.43), beating Chalky. Will find this a bit tougher, good win last start but looks tested in this difficult assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 3 lengths over 425m at Bendigo in a handy (24.43), beating Chalky. Will find this a bit tougher, good win last start but looks tested in this difficult assignment.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing on April 12 over 350m at Healesville in a Grade 5. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing on April 12 over 350m at Healesville in a Grade 5. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at Warrnambool (22.46) beating Xisan Bale in a Grade 5 on April 2. Has claims on best form.

formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at Warrnambool (22.46) beating Xisan Bale in a Grade 5 on April 2. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Bendigo over 425m in 24.25. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 425m at Bendigo at Special conditions H level. Looks a solid contender.

formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Bendigo over 425m in 24.25. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 425m at Bendigo at Special conditions H level. Looks a solid contender.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Bendigo (24.45) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length fourth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Expected to be in the finish.
